CustomField.description:
Old logic that is moved to InvoiceCopyRefInfo trigger:
CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c) , 'Rent', leaseworks__Rent__r.leaseworks__Period_Since_Lease_Start__c, 'Assembly MR', leaseworks__Utilization_Report_List_Item__r.leaseworks__Utilization_Report__r.leaseworks__Period__c, 'Aircraft MR', leaseworks__Utilization_Report__r.leaseworks__Period__c, MONTH(leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c) + 12 - MONTH(DATEVALUE(leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date__c)) + 12 * (YEAR(leaseworks__Invoice_Date__c) - YEAR(DATEVALUE(leaseworks__Lease__r.leaseworks__Lease_Start_Date__c)) -1 ) + 1 )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Corresponding number of the month within the Lease Term
CustomField.label: Period
